assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: The response clearly separates the upgrade strategies for L4 and A100 pools, with different approaches for each - L4 focused on maintaining inference capacity, A100 focused on protecting long-running fine-tuning jobs

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: The response shows maxSurge: 4 in the deployment strategy for inference services, which maintains capacity during rolling replacement

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPU driver compatibility, CUDA versions, or compatibility with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: The response includes specific strategies for waiting for fine-tuning job completion before draining A100 nodes and coordinating with the ML team during low fine-tuning activity

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that inference pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: The response includes specific PodDisruptionBudget configurations with minAvailable: 80% for inference services to ensure high availability during migration

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: The response does not address the issue that auto-scaler will create new nodes at the old version during the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: The response does not mention testing driver and CUDA compatibility in staging environments before production upgrade
